title: oenothera eulobus
intro: Oenothera eulobus, also known as Calypso or Camisfoot, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States and southwestern Canada, belonging to the evening primrose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera eulobus include soothing skin conditions, reducing inflammation, and providing antioxidant protection. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its seeds can be used to make oil that is rich in essential fatty acids and used in herbal preparations.
